svg.style: background-color: #fafafa; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
svg.desc: A mind map illustrating "The Anatomy of a Mind Map." The central node "Mind Mapping" radiates four primary branches: Core Concepts (upper-right, purple -- Central Idea, Radiant Structure, Keywords Only, Imagery and Color, Hierarchy), Benefits (lower-right, green -- Enhanced Memory, Boosts Creativity, Clear Structuring, Problem Solving, Fast Note Taking), Applications (lower-left, orange -- Project Mgmt, Brainstorming, Lesson Planning, Exam Prep, Knowledge Base), and Techniques (upper-left, pink -- Start in Center, Radiate Outward, Curve the Lines, Visual Coding, 1 Word per Branch). Each branch uses thick curved lines from center to branch node, then thinner curved lines from branch node to five leaf nodes.

g.text: THE ANATOMY OF A MIND MAP

g.aria-label: Branch edge from Mind Mapping to Core Concepts
Branch edge from Mind Mapping to Benefits
Branch edge from Mind Mapping to Applications
Branch edge from Mind Mapping to Techniques
Leaf edge from Core Concepts to Central Idea

Leaf edge from Applications to Exam Prep

Central Idea - The root anchor concept
Radiant Structure - Branches expanding outward
Keywords Only - Triggers rapid association
Imagery and Color - Stimulates visual memory
Hierarchy - General flowing to specific
Enhanced Memory - Spatially mapped info
Boosts Creativity - Supports non-linear thinking
Clear Structuring - Visualizing high complexity
Problem Solving - Revealing big picture links
Fast Note Taking - Capturing real-time points
Project Mgmt - Task and scope breakdown
Brainstorming - Rapid idea generation
Lesson Planning - Curriculum and syllabus design
Exam Prep - Topic summaries and review
Knowledge Base - Organizing vast resources
Start in Center - Provides blank page freedom
Radiate Outward - Logical branching flow
Curve the Lines - Organic, brain-friendly visual
Visual Coding - Color-matching sub-topics
1 Word per Branch - Maximizes cognitive flexibility
Core Concepts - primary branch (upper-right)
Benefits - primary branch (lower-right)
Applications - primary branch (lower-left)
Techniques - primary branch (upper-left)
Mind Mapping - central concept of the mind map
